name: Kosrae State (Micronesia)

colors.symbolism: the field, for the ever-present ocean
the stars, the Fafa stone and the wreath

description: A light blue field with four white five-pointed stars, one for each municipality of Kosrae, above a white 'Fafa' ceremonial stone flanked by a wreath of laurel leaves.
history: Kosrae is the easternmost state of the Federated States of Micronesia. Its flag, adopted on 28 July 1981, shows four stars for its municipalities and the Fafa ceremonial stone, with a wreath commemorating the era of UN trusteeship.
